name: accountants managing 5–15 clients/month tool
description: For accountants managing 5–15 clients/month, inefficient document preparation causes late filings. We automate tax document generation instead of manual document preparation and filing.
problem_solved: Inefficient generation of tax filing documents from financial statements.
features: manual input for financial statement analysis
